embeddingText: Lufttransport, flygtransport, charterflyg, gods, passagerartransport, operativ täckning, trafik och områden, kontaktförfrågan, referenser, team, karta, öppettider.
llmClassificationHints: Use this scaffold when the business primarily provides air transport or aviation-based transport services.
Prefer an operations or coverage page because visitors need to understand where and how the company flies or operates.
Do not force ecommerce, menu, or generic local tradesman structures onto this industry.
